languages.text: "Подобный вопрос я слышал сотни раз. И вообразите: его ни разу не задал праведник. Хозяин этой планеты — Себериан фон Валанциус — несколько циклов назад скомпрометировал себя чудовищной ксеноересью. Отринув устои Человечества, он подписал приговор себе и всему Даргонусу".

traits.locale_text: "Подобный вопрос я слышал сотни раз. И вообразите: его ни разу не задал праведник. Хозяин этой планеты — Себериан фон Валанциус — несколько циклов назад скомпрометировал себя чудовищной ксеноересью. Отринув устои Человечества, он подписал приговор себе и всему Даргонусу".

languages.text: "I have been asked something like that question hundreds of times. And, I must say, it has never been asked by a righteous person. The lord of this planet, Seberian von Valancius, compromised himself several cycles ago by committing monstrous xenoheresy. In forsaking the very foundations of Humanity, he has sealed the fate of himself and all Dargonus."
languages.original_text: "Подобный вопрос я слышал сотни раз. И вообразите: его ни разу не задал праведник. Хозяин этой планеты — Себериан фон Валанциус — несколько циклов назад скомпрометировал себя чудовищной ксеноересью. Отринув устои Человечества, он подписал приговор себе и всему Даргонусу".

The lord of this planet, Seberian von Valancius, compromised himself several cycles ago by committing monstrous xenoheresy. In forsaking the very foundations of Humanity, he has sealed the fate of himself and all Dargonus."

languages.text: “诸如此类的问题，我都不知被问过几百遍了。而且说实话，问出这问题的都不是什么正义之士。这颗行星的领主，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，在多个周期前就已自甘堕落，犯下了骇人的异形异端罪行。他背弃了人类存在的根基，也因此注定了自己与整个达戈努斯的毁灭。”
languages.original_text: "I have been asked something like that question hundreds of times. And, I must say, it has never been asked by a righteous person. The lord of this planet, Seberian von Valancius, compromised himself several cycles ago by committing monstrous xenoheresy. In forsaking the very foundations of Humanity, he has sealed the fate of himself and all Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: “诸如此类的问题，我都不知被问过几百遍了。而且说实话，问出这问题的都不是什么正义之士。这颗行星的领主，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，在多个周期前就已自甘堕落，犯下了骇人的异形异端罪行。他背弃了人类存在的根基，也因此注定了自己与整个达戈努斯的毁灭。”

languages.text: « On m'a posé cette question des centaines de fois et je dois dire qu'elle ne venait jamais de la bouche d'une personne respectable. Le seigneur de cette planète, Seberian von Valancius, s'est compromis il y a plusieurs cycles lorsqu'il a commis une monstrueuse xénohérésie. En abandonnant les fondations mêmes de l'humanité, il a condamné Dargonus à sombrer avec lui. »
languages.original_text: "I have been asked something like that question hundreds of times. And, I must say, it has never been asked by a righteous person. The lord of this planet, Seberian von Valancius, compromised himself several cycles ago by committing monstrous xenoheresy. In forsaking the very foundations of Humanity, he has sealed the fate of himself and all Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: « On m'a posé cette question des centaines de fois et je dois dire qu'elle ne venait jamais de la bouche d'une personne respectable. Le seigneur de cette planète, Seberian von Valancius, s'est compromis il y a plusieurs cycles lorsqu'il a commis une monstrueuse xénohérésie. En abandonnant les fondations mêmes de l'humanité, il a condamné Dargonus à sombrer avec lui. »

languages.text: "Bu soruya benzer yüzlerce soru soruldu. Söylemeliyim ki hiçbir zaman erdemli insanlar tarafından sorulmadı. Bu gezegenin lordu Seberian von Valancius, birkaç döngü önce korkunç bir zeno kâfirliğine bulaşarak kendini tehlikeye attı. İnsanlığın temellerini reddederek kendisinin ve tüm Dargonus'un kaderini belirledi."
languages.original_text: "I have been asked something like that question hundreds of times. And, I must say, it has never been asked by a righteous person. The lord of this planet, Seberian von Valancius, compromised himself several cycles ago by committing monstrous xenoheresy. In forsaking the very foundations of Humanity, he has sealed the fate of himself and all Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: "Bu soruya benzer yüzlerce soru soruldu. Söylemeliyim ki hiçbir zaman erdemli insanlar tarafından sorulmadı. Bu gezegenin lordu Seberian von Valancius, birkaç döngü önce korkunç bir zeno kâfirliğine bulaşarak kendini tehlikeye attı. İnsanlığın temellerini reddederek kendisinin ve tüm Dargonus'un kaderini belirledi."

languages.text: «Me han preguntado cosas como esa cientos de veces. Debo decir que nunca lo ha hecho una persona justa. El señor de este planeta, Seberian von Valancius, se condenó hace ciclos al cometer una monstruosa xenoherejía. Al abandonar los cimientos mismos de la Humanidad, ha sellado su destino y el de todo Dargonus».
languages.original_text: "I have been asked something like that question hundreds of times. And, I must say, it has never been asked by a righteous person. The lord of this planet, Seberian von Valancius, compromised himself several cycles ago by committing monstrous xenoheresy. In forsaking the very foundations of Humanity, he has sealed the fate of himself and all Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: «Me han preguntado cosas como esa cientos de veces. Debo decir que nunca lo ha hecho una persona justa. El señor de este planeta, Seberian von Valancius, se condenó hace ciclos al cometer una monstruosa xenoherejía. Al abandonar los cimientos mismos de la Humanidad, ha sellado su destino y el de todo Dargonus».

languages.text: "Diese Frage wurde mir schon Hunderte Male gestellt. Allerdings, das gebe ich zu, noch nie von einer rechtschaffenen Person. Der Lord dieses Planeten, Seberian von Valancius, hat sich vor mehreren Zyklen selbst kompromittiert, indem er eine monströse Xeno-Ketzerei beging. Als er den Fundamenten der Menschheit entsagte, hat er sein eigenes und das Schicksal von ganz Dargonus besiegelt."
languages.original_text: "I have been asked something like that question hundreds of times. And, I must say, it has never been asked by a righteous person. The lord of this planet, Seberian von Valancius, compromised himself several cycles ago by committing monstrous xenoheresy. In forsaking the very foundations of Humanity, he has sealed the fate of himself and all Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Frage wurde mir schon Hunderte Male gestellt. Allerdings, das gebe ich zu, noch nie von einer rechtschaffenen Person. Der Lord dieses Planeten, Seberian von Valancius, hat sich vor mehreren Zyklen selbst kompromittiert, indem er eine monströse Xeno-Ketzerei beging. Als er den Fundamenten der Menschheit entsagte, hat er sein eigenes und das Schicksal von ganz Dargonus besiegelt."

languages.text: 「そのような質問は数百回も受けました。そして、正直に言わせてもらえば、それは正義の人たちから一度も聞かれたことがありません。この惑星の支配者であるセベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウスは、数サイクル前に恐ろしい異教を犯し、自ら汚しました。人類の根幹を放棄した彼は、自分とドラゴナスの人々を滅ぼす運命を自らに刻みました。」
languages.original_text: "I have been asked something like that question hundreds of times. And, I must say, it has never been asked by a righteous person. The lord of this planet, Seberian von Valancius, compromised himself several cycles ago by committing monstrous xenoheresy. In forsaking the very foundations of Humanity, he has sealed the fate of himself and all Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: 「そのような質問は数百回も受けました。そして、正直に言わせてもらえば、それは正義の人たちから一度も聞かれたことがありません。この惑星の支配者であるセベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウスは、数サイクル前に恐ろしい異教を犯し、自ら汚しました。人類の根幹を放棄した彼は、自分とドラゴナスの人々を滅ぼす運命を自らに刻みました。」
